tasks.desc: Add Fish Collection / Aquarium view to fishing panel with backend endpoint

notes: HARD STOP: Do NOT run more mobile CSS tweaks. GPT mobile score has been 3-4/10 for 40+ sprints (evo-126 to evo-167). This is a structural limitation — the evaluator penalizes scrolling card lists regardless of CSS quality. The desktop score is 7-8/10 and the game works well. Future sprints should focus ONLY on: (1) new gameplay features, (2) island page improvements, (3) backend features, (4) content/islands. NO MORE LOBBY MOBILE CSS.
